feat.name: Soothing Pulse
feat.text:
Your ostilli can use its stored magic to help staunch your wounds, granting you the Administer Ambient Magic action.  
  
**Administer Ambient Magic** (healing)

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.effect: Your ostilli pulses a calm lavender color as it converts stored magic into a curative balm. You regain 2d4 Hit Points, and you can immediately attempt a flat check to recover from persistent bleed damage with the DC reduced to 10. This healing increases by 2d4 at 8th level and every 4 levels thereafter.
